title: Verify user login to logout journey with EULA page
scenario: Verify full user login-to-logout journey including EULA acceptance, update notification, account login, menu navigation, and logout with "Log In" button displayed
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app for the first time.
2. Observe the EULA / Privacy Policy agreement screen.
3. Tap 'Accept' to agree to the EULA and Privacy Policy.
4. Observe the 'Up-to-Date' update notification page and proceed past it.
7. From the Account screen, tap the Main Menu (hamburger icon or three-dot menu).
8. Navigate through the following menu options: Color Theme, About, General Settings.
10. Tap 'Log Out' to sign out of the account.
11. Observe the Account screen after logout.
expected: After logout, the Account screen displays a 'Log In' button.
